message:
feat(fcp-store): zone lifecycle snapshot for durable-object debugging

Adds a deterministic zone-level lifecycle snapshot that exposes current
durable-plane state for debugging without requiring GC or repair
internals. The snapshot captures root set validity, object reachability
via BFS from valid roots, per-object retention/lease state, symbol
coverage evaluation, placement policy satisfaction, and reconstruction
feasibility.

New types: ZoneLifecycleSnapshot, ObjectLifecycleSnapshot,
LifecycleRootObservation, LifecycleRootRole, LifecycleRootStatus,
ObjectLeaseState. The snapshot_zone_lifecycle() async function traverses
the root set, classifies each root as Valid/Missing/ForeignZone, walks
the object graph for reachability, and evaluates coverage when a symbol
store is available.

The snapshot is designed for artifact bundles that capture before/after
state across repair and GC operations, enabling deterministic regression
tests and operator-facing diagnostics.

- object_store.rs: +275 lines of lifecycle snapshot types and logic
- error.rs: added LifecycleSnapshotError variant
- lib.rs: re-exported snapshot_zone_lifecycle and all new public types
- repair.rs, symbol_store.rs: minor API adjustments for new consumers
- store_repair_integration.rs: test validating reachability, coverage,
  reconstruction, and lease state against a two-object zone with
  partial symbol distribution across two nodes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
